heading: Land appraisal
label: 410aaa–80 Land appraisal
text: Lands and interests in lands acquired pursuant to this Act shall be appraised without regard to the presence of a species listed as threatened or endangered pursuant to the Endangered Species Act of 1973 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 1531
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is defined in , which is set out as a Definitions note under .section 3 of Pub. L. 103–433section 410aaa of this titleThe Endangered Species Act of 1973, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified principally to chapter 35 (§ 1531 et seq.) of this title.
